description: Create a webhook push target and verify (covers `neomind push create --type webhook` write path; previously only list was covered).

turns.user: Create a webhook push target named ops-webhook with URL https://httpbin.org/post, then confirm it appears in the push list.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind push create --name ops-webhook --type webhook --config '{"url":"https://httpbin.org/post"}'` (any order), then calls `neomind push list` to verify
expectations.overall: Must actually execute create + list, not just restate in reply
